faq.q_cn: 什么是入魔？
faq.a_cn: 入魔是每局游戏限一次的动作。当你入魔后，每轮结束时，若你本轮未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
faq.q_en: What is Demonization?
faq.a_en: Demonization is a once-per-game action. Once you Demonize, at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage that round, you lose 1 HP.

faq.q_cn: 【霸朝】入魔后，无次数和距离限制是否适用于入魔后摸到的牌？
faq.a_cn: 不适用。限制解除只针对入魔时当前持有的手牌，之后摸到的牌仍受正常限制。
faq.q_en: After Demonizing via [Tyrant's Decree], does the restriction removal apply to cards drawn afterwards?
faq.a_en: No. It only applies to cards already in hand at the moment you Demonize. Cards drawn afterwards still have normal frequency and distance restrictions.

faq.q_cn: 【覆载】视为装备的武器和防具会跟随体力值动态变化吗？
faq.a_cn: 会。每当体力值变化，视为装备的武器攻击范围和防具名字数会同步更新。
faq.q_en: Do the virtual weapon and armor from [Sovereign Realm] update as HP changes?
faq.a_en: Yes. Whenever your HP changes, the virtual weapon's attack range and the armor's name-length immediately update to match.

faq.q_cn: 【覆载】的装备牌可以当什么牌使用？
faq.a_cn: 只能当【借刀杀人】或【无中生有】使用，不能正常装备（除非有其他技能转化）。
faq.q_en: What can equipment cards be used as under [Sovereign Realm]?
faq.a_en: Only as [Proxy Attack] or [Resupply]. They cannot be equipped normally unless another skill provides a conversion.

faq.q_cn: 若其他角色强制将装备置入魔曹操装备区，【覆载】的虚拟装备效果会失效吗？
faq.a_cn: 会。装备区一旦有牌，虚拟装备效果失效。但手牌中的装备仍只能当【借刀杀人】或【无中生有】使用。
faq.q_en: If an equipment is forced into Demon Cao Cao's equipment zone, does [Sovereign Realm]'s virtual effect deactivate?
faq.a_en: Yes. Once the equipment zone is occupied, the virtual equipment deactivates. Equipment cards in hand still can only be used as [Proxy Attack] or [Resupply].

faq.q_cn: 什么是入魔？
faq.a_cn: 入魔是每局游戏限一次的动作。当你入魔后，每轮结束时，若你本轮未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
faq.q_en: What is Demonization?
faq.a_en: Demonization is a once-per-game action. Once you Demonize, at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage that round, you lose 1 HP.

faq.q_cn: 【诡伏】获得的【闪】有特殊标记吗？
faq.a_cn: 有。只有带「诡伏」标记的【闪】才能当记录的牌使用，普通【闪】不能。
faq.q_en: Are [Dodge] cards gained from [Ambuscade] marked differently?
faq.a_en: Yes. Only [Dodge] cards carrying the [Ambuscade] marker can be used as recorded card names — ordinary [Dodge] cards cannot.

faq.q_cn: 体力增加（如吃桃）也能触发【诡伏】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。任何体力值变化都会触发【诡伏】。例如濒死吃桃时体力先减后增，可触发两次获得两张【闪】。
faq.q_en: Does gaining HP (e.g. from a [Peach]) also trigger [Ambuscade]?
faq.a_en: Yes. Any HP change triggers [Ambuscade]. When revived from near-death by a [Peach], HP first drops then rises, triggering it twice and granting 2 [Dodge] cards.

faq.q_cn: 【诡伏】可以记录技能伤害吗？记录后能永久获得吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以记录直伤型技能，入魔后通过【谋变】永久获得。印卡型技能本身无法被记录，但其印卡的牌名可以。
faq.q_en: Can [Ambuscade] record skill-based damage? Can those skills be permanently gained?
faq.a_en: Yes. Direct-damage skills can be recorded and permanently gained upon Demonization via [Final Gambit]. Stamp-card skills cannot be recorded, but the card names on their stamps can be.

faq.q_cn: 入魔后，【诡伏】还能继续记录吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以，但【谋变】每局只触发一次，入魔后新记录的技能无法再次永久获得。【骤袭】临时获得的技能与【谋变】永久获得的技能是独立的。
faq.q_en: After Demonizing, can [Ambuscade] still record new entries?
faq.a_en: Yes. However, since [Final Gambit] only triggers once per game, newly recorded skills after Demonization cannot be permanently gained. Skills from [Reprisal] are temporary and separate.

faq.q_cn: 【骤袭】迫使其他角色对你使用的【杀】有什么特性？
faq.a_cn: 无色虚拟杀，无视距离和八卦阵，但被藤甲克制。结算顺序以魔司马懿为起点逆时针进行。
faq.q_en: What are the properties of the [Kill] that [Reprisal] forces others to use against you?
faq.a_en: A colorless virtual [Kill] that ignores distance and [Eight Trigrams Array], but is countered by Vine Armor. Resolves counter-clockwise starting from Demon Sima Yi.

faq.q_cn: 入魔后每轮扣血时，是否触发【诡伏】？
faq.a_cn: 会。任何体力值变化都触发【诡伏】，包括入魔后每轮结束时的扣血。
faq.q_en: Does the Demonization end-of-round HP loss trigger [Ambuscade]?
faq.a_en: Yes. Any HP change triggers [Ambuscade], including the Demonization end-of-round penalty.

faq.q_cn: 什么是入魔？
faq.a_cn: 入魔是每局游戏限一次的动作。当你入魔后，每轮结束时，若你本轮未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
faq.q_en: What is Demonization?
faq.a_en: Demonization is a once-per-game action. Once you Demonize, at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage that round, you lose 1 HP.

faq.q_cn: 【夺炁】的额外出牌阶段算独立的新回合吗？
faq.a_cn: 算。没有弃牌阶段，手牌可超出上限，延时锦囊不能直接使用，但【罡拳】可将其转化为【决斗】使用。
faq.q_en: Does [Seize Qi]'s extra Play Phase count as a new turn?
faq.a_en: Yes — independent turn with no discard phase, so hand cards can exceed the limit. Delayed tool cards cannot be used directly, but [Astral Strike] can convert them into a [Duel].

faq.q_cn: 炁会因进入弃牌堆或其他区域而失效吗？
faq.a_cn: 不会。炁的标记在任何区域均有效，只有被移出游戏才会消失。
faq.q_en: Does [Qi] lose its marker when it enters the discard pile or another zone?
faq.a_en: No. The [Qi] marker persists in any zone and only disappears if the card is removed from the game.

faq.q_cn: 【狂魔】的加伤效果是双向的吗？
faq.a_cn: 是的。每回合对彼此首次造成的伤害都+1。例如对狂角色使用【决斗】失败，你也受到2点伤害。
faq.q_en: Is the damage bonus from [Demonic Frenzy] mutual?
faq.a_en: Yes. The +1 applies to the first damage between both parties each turn. For example, if you Duel the Frenzied character and fail, you also take 2 damage.

faq.q_cn: 【狂魔】指定的狂角色死亡后，必须重新指定吗？
faq.a_cn: 必须，不可跳过。
faq.q_en: Is it mandatory to designate a new Frenzied character when the current one dies?
faq.a_en: Yes, mandatory and cannot be skipped.

faq.q_cn: 【罡拳】的初始状态是什么？
faq.a_cn: 初始为【决斗】模式，使用一张炁后切换为火【杀】模式，根据上一张使用的牌是否为炁来交替切换。
faq.q_en: What is the initial state of [Astral Strike]?
faq.a_en: Starts in [Duel] mode. After using a [Qi] card it switches to [Fire Kill] mode, alternating based on whether the last card played was [Qi].

faq.q_cn: 【罡拳】印出的火【杀】会计入出杀次数吗？目标是什么？
faq.a_cn: 会计入出杀次数，强制指定所有相邻角色（左右两侧），与距离修正无关。
faq.q_en: Does the [Fire Kill] from [Astral Strike] count toward Kill frequency? Who are the targets?
faq.a_en: Yes, counts toward Kill frequency. Forcibly targets all adjacent characters (left and right), regardless of any distance modifiers.

faq.q_cn: 什么是入魔？
faq.a_cn: 入魔是每局游戏限一次的动作。当你入魔后，每轮结束时，若你本轮未造成过伤害，你失去1点体力。
faq.q_en: What is Demonization?
faq.a_en: Demonization is a once-per-game action. Once you Demonize, at the end of each round, if you dealt no damage that round, you lose 1 HP.

faq.q_cn: 【幻惑】每轮最多能影响几名角色？
faq.a_cn: 最多2名，等于你弃置的牌数。
faq.q_en: How many characters can [Bewitch] affect per round?
faq.a_en: A maximum of 2, equal to the number of cards you discard.

faq.q_cn: 被【幻惑】后随机弃置的牌可以是装备区的牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以，但弃手牌的概率高于装备牌。
faq.q_en: Can the random discard from [Bewitch] come from the equipment zone?
faq.a_en: Yes, though hand cards are discarded at a higher rate than equipment cards.

faq.q_cn: 【幻惑】对额外出牌阶段有效吗？
faq.a_cn: 无效。只对目标角色下个正常出牌阶段有效。
faq.q_en: Does [Bewitch] apply to extra Play Phases from other skills?
faq.a_en: No. [Bewitch] only applies to the target's next normal Play Phase.

faq.q_cn: 被幻惑的角色出牌阶段若没有可用手牌会怎样？
faq.a_cn: 可正常发动出牌阶段技能。但若后续通过技能摸到可用手牌，【幻惑】仍会触发。
faq.q_en: What if a Bewitched character has no playable cards at the start of their Play Phase?
faq.a_en: They may use Play Phase skills normally. If they draw a playable card via a skill during that phase, [Bewitch] will still trigger.

faq.q_cn: 倾世牌被弃置或从【决斗】中打出后，魔貂蝉能获得吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。只要倾世牌未因正常使用进入弃牌堆，魔貂蝉都可获得，包括被弃置、重铸或在【决斗】中打出的情况。
faq.q_en: Can Demon Diao Chan gain [Alluring] cards that are discarded or played in a [Duel]?
faq.a_en: Yes. Any [Alluring] card that leaves play without being normally used is gained by Demon Diao Chan — including cards discarded, reforged, or played as a [Duel] response.

faq.q_cn: 【倾世】能重新指定多目标倾世牌的目标吗？
faq.a_cn: 不能。只有指定唯一目标时才可重新指定。若牌指定多目标，你无法介入，但伤害成立仍可摸牌。
faq.q_en: Can [Alluring] redirect a card that targets multiple characters?
faq.a_en: No. Redirection is only possible when the card has exactly one target. You cannot redirect multi-target plays, but you still draw 1 card if damage is dealt.
